problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: The key to What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? is Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering — specifically Electrospun nanofiber scaffold — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
